title: Hiring Production Engineer at Prince Pipes Capital India

jsonLd.title: Hiring Production Engineer at Prince Pipes Capital India
jsonLd.description:
We at Prince Pipes Capital India are looking for an experienced Production Engineer based out of Bhubaneswar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Prince Pipes Capital India:
Prince Pipes Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Prince Pipes Capital India!
